At St. James Live, we prioritize both exceptional cuisine and an inviting atmosphere. Our menu is designed to pair perfectly with our live entertainment, ensuring that every visit is a feast for the senses.
Small Plates: Start your evening with our mouth-watering appetizers. From grilled shrimp skewers to lamb lollipops, our starters are the perfect prelude to your main course.
Decadent Desserts: Treat yourself to our indulgent desserts. Our sweet offerings are the perfect ending to your dining experience.
Signature Drinks: Complement your meal with our signature cocktails, premium wines, and craft beers. Our expertly crafted drink menu is designed to enhance your dining experience and make your night even more enjoyable.
**Reserve Your Table**: Don’t miss out on a delightful dining experience. Book your table now and enjoy a night of great food, music, and ambiance at St. James Live Atlanta.
